content: Wheel names are done. Tulu's might get a change in the coming days, but it will be done quickly if the change is necessary.
Gameplay - PanelText, LanguageConf, ActorAttr, CardType, TrinketSuitEffect

FOR VOLUNTEERS OF ALL LANGUAGES:
I organized the scattered sheet rows relating to the Wheels of Destiny in the game for ease of access and to make translation more convenient.

IMPORTANT/README:
1. The **Font and Typeface of all relevant cells have been standardized to the default Excel style**; I don't know if this will cause unforeseen issues, so my bad if I shouldn't have done that.
2. **I added two Columns** to the sheet to make organization easier.
  - COLUMN A:A "SRC ROW" is the original Row # that the line was pulled from in the "Gameplay" Source Sheet.
  - COLUMN I:I is the corresponding Names of the Wheels represented by each chunk of rows.
  - DELETE THESE COLUMNS (A:A & I:I) to return the worksheet to the positions of its original columns.
3. **The Sheet Rows have been RE-ORDERED** to help facilitate ease of understanding. For most Wheels:
  - Row 1 is the Description when viewing the wheel itself;
  - Row 2 is the Description as presented in the Awakener's context menu in-battle;
  - Row 3 is the Name of the Wheel;
  - Row 4 is the "Synopsis" of the Wheel *(as seen, for example, in gacha banners)*;
  - Row 5 is the Flavor Text of the Wheel.
  - Some Wheels have more than 5 Rows due to having a derivative Buff that appears in gameplay.
4. Sheet #2 "Gacha" is the un-sorted chunk of lines corresponding to the Rate-Up banners that can appear for limited Wheels. I didn't bother sorting these, sorry.

HOPE THIS HELPS! May the Silver Key guide us.
